name: roster-full
_doc: Full mode template (post-plan phases): implement → review → qa → ship. Pre-plan phases (question/research/intake/spec/plan) run before workflow dispatch.

steps.prompt: Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-implement" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-implement. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-implement.

Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-review" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-review. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-review.

Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-qa" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-qa. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-qa.

Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-ship" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-ship. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-ship.
